2604.27559.title: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
2604.27559.paper_summary: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach to alleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automatically generating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is achieving fine-grained alignment between complex visual features and the hierarchical structure of long-form radiology reports. Although recent methods have improved image-text representation learning, they often treat reports as flat sequences, overlooking their structured sections and semantic hierarchies. This simplification hinders precise cross-modal alignment and weakens RRG accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose RIHA (Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment Transformer), a novel end-to-end framework that performs multi-level alignment between radiological images and their corresponding reports across paragraph, sentence, and word levels. This hierarchical alignment enables more precise cross-modal mapping, essential for capturing the nuanced semantics embedded in clinical narratives. Specifically, RIHA introduces a Visual Feature Pyramid (VFP) to extract multi-scale visual features and a Text Feature Pyramid (TFP) to represent multi-granularity textual structures. These components are integrated through a Cross-modal Hierarchical Alignment (CHA) module, leveraging optimal transport to effectively align visual and textual features across various levels. Furthermore, we incorporate Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) into the decoder to model spatial and semantic relationships among tokens, enhancing the token-level alignment between visual features and generated text. Extensive experiments on two benchmark chest X-ray datasets, IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR, demonstrate that RIHA outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in both natural language generation and clinical efficacy metrics.
2604.27559.paper_summary_zh: 放射學報告生成（RRG）已成為一種有前景的方法，旨在減輕放射科醫生的工作負擔並通過自動從醫學影像生成診斷報告來減少人為錯誤。<lb/>RRG的一個主要挑戰是實現複雜視覺特徵與長格式放射學報告的層次結構之間的細緻對齊。<lb/>儘管最近的方法改善了圖像-文本表示學習，但它們通常將報告視為平坦序列，忽略了其結構化的部分和語義層次。<lb/>這種簡化妨礙了精確的跨模態對齊，並削弱了RRG的準確性。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了RIHA（報告-影像層次對齊Transformer），這是一個新穎的端到端框架，能夠在段落、句子和單詞層面上對放射影像及其相應報告進行多層次對齊。<lb/>這種層次對齊使得更精確的跨模態映射成為可能，這對於捕捉臨床敘事中嵌入的細微語義至關重要。<lb/>具體來說，RIHA引入了一個視覺特徵金字塔（VFP）來提取多尺度視覺特徵，以及一個文本特徵金字塔（TFP）來表示多粒度文本結構。<lb/>這些組件通過一個跨模態層次對齊（CHA）模塊集成，利用最佳運輸有效地對齊各個層次的視覺和文本特徵。<lb/>此外，我們在解碼器中納入了相對位置編碼（RPE），以建模標記之間的空間和語義關係，增強視覺特徵與生成文本之間的標記級對齊。<lb/>在兩個基準胸部X光數據集IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR上的廣泛實驗表明，RIHA在自然語言生成和臨床效能指標上均超越了現有的最先進模型。
2604.27559.author: Yucheng Chen et.al.
2604.27559.authors: Yucheng Chen, Yang Yu, Yufei Shi, Conghao Xiong, Xulei Yang, Si Yong Yeo
